items.name: writing-plans
items.title: Writing Plans
items.description: Turn a spec or set of requirements into a detailed, task-by-task implementation plan an engineer (or a subagent) can execute without further context. Breaks work into bite-sized steps with exact file paths, real code, and verification commands. Use before starting a multi-step build, once you know what you're building.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
